programs.title: Beyond the Gates
programs.desc: Kat challenges Bill; Joey assigns Randy an urgent task; Vanessa has a business proposition for Hayley; Lia's threats chill Grayson; Jacob worries a dangerous trap has been set.

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.sub_title: Single Mom ... Married Boyfriend!; Cheating on Facebook?
programs.desc: A single mother says she lent thousands of dollars to a man who says they were never intimate; a woman's cheating boyfriend accuses her of stealing his property.

programs.title: Judge Judy
programs.sub_title: Twin Girls Repoed Ride!; Mangled Motorcycle Mix-Up!; Ex-Fiance Crash!
programs.desc: A man co-signs a loan for his grandchildren's father, and his favor is returned with nonpayment and a repo; a friend totals an imprisoned man's motorcycle and is seriously injured; a woman sues her ex-fiance for crashing her car and injuring her.

programs.title: Hot Bench
programs.desc: A friendly loan turns into radio silence and rage; a woman says she was ghosted after lending her former friend cash, but the borrower fires back, accusing her of harassment and making threats; this is a deal that proves short loans can have long memories.

programs.title: Hot Bench
programs.desc: A substitute schoolteacher sues her former student and his mother, who she says were great landlords for years -- until they started harassing her; the son says he felt the need to pepper spray her in self-defense.
